mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-01#SQL002 */ A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME || '（' || A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE || '）' AS BB_PRODUCT, A.BB_STOCK, CASE WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '1' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '株') WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '2' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円') WHEN A.BB_UNIT_KBN = '3' THEN DECODE(A.BB_STOCK, null, null, TO_CHAR(A.BB_STOCK, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '口') END AS BB_STOCK_STR, A.BB_LOT_DATE, A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE, A.BB_PRICE_FROM, A.BB_PRICE_TO, A.BB_PRICE_CUT, A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, A.BB_DISCOUNT_CUT, A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE, NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AS BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO AS BB_PRESENTATION_TO, TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS BB_PRESENTATION_FROM_STR, TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS BB_PRESENTATION, A.BB_SETTLE_DATE, A.BB_URGENT_STOP, DECODE(A.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株') AS BB_UNIT_KBN, A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN, CASE WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_FROM, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_TO, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '0' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' || '～' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN 'ストライクプライス・' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_FROM, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' || '～' || TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRICE_TO, 'FM9,999,999,999') || '円' WHEN A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = '1' AND A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN 'ディスカウント率・ストライクプライス・' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' || '～' || RTRIM(TO_CHAR(A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, 'FM990.9999'), '.') || '%' END AS ASSUME_CONDITION FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = B.PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{bbProductCode} AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{bbPresentationFrom}
